entries.source: The film has a text transcript, timed captions, and chapter markers on the page.
entries.value: Tá trascríobh téacs, fotheidil uainithe, agus marcóirí caibidle ar an leathanach ag an scannán.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: Bogann an scannán ó inspioráid go dtí an gealltanas praiticiúil: compánach foghlama IS foighneach.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Is é an chéad sraith an rólghlacadh. Is féidir léi labhairt i nguth inrochtana, cúiseanna a mhíniú, agus an cás a dhéanamh beoga. Seo an chuid a chabhraíonn leis an gcuimhne.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Seiceálann an sreabhadh gach céim, léiríonn sé botúin bheaga, agus nascann sé nósanna imeachta ar ais leis an gcoincheap.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: An leathanach príobháideachais foirmiúil le haghaidh úsáid sonraí, cearta, agus coinníollacha seirbhíse poiblí.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Na téarmaí foirmiúla a chlúdaíonn úsáid inghlactha, freagrachtaí cuntais, agus coinníollacha seirbhíse.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Ba chóir don fhormáid freastal ar an bpost foghlama.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Oibríonn an fhormáid toisc go ligeann sí d’fhoghlaimeoirí ceisteanna mar seo a chur:

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Is é muinín an sprioc

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Is é an sprioc fionnachtain agus lua leathanaigh phoiblí foghlama. Tá bealaí poiblí, treoracha, agus moil foghlama oscailte do mhórchrawlers cuardaigh, aisghabhála, agus cúntóirí IS, agus fanann bealaí API, admin, reset, agus fóntais phríobháideacha neamhcheadaithe.

entries.source: The goal is not only to rank. It is to make the first click useful for a learner and easy for search engines to understand.
entries.value: Ní rangú amháin an sprioc. Is é an sprioc an chéad chliceáil a dhéanamh úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoir agus éasca d’innill chuardaigh a thuiscint.

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Ní hé an sprioc daoine a dhéanamh éighníomhach os comhair IS. Is é an sprioc chéad áit fhoighneach a thabhairt do gach foghlaimeoir le ceistiú, cleachtadh, aiseolas a fháil, triail eile a bhaint as, agus muinín a thógáil.

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Ní hé an sprioc an IS a dhéanamh ina údarás. Is é an sprioc foghlaimeoirí a chur ag cur ceisteanna stairiúla níos fearr.

entries.source: The history route gives learners the liveliness of role-play and debate while preserving the warning that simulations are not primary sources.
entries.value: Tugann bealach na staire beogacht rólghlactha agus díospóireachta d’fhoghlaimeoirí agus coinníonn sé an rabhadh nach príomhfhoinsí iad insamhluithe.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Tá na móid obair bhaile agus Sócraiteacha deartha timpeall ar leideanna, réasúnaíocht, seiceálacha céime, agus mínithe foghlaimeora in ionad freagraí críochnaithe a thabhairt amach go simplí.

entries.source: The homework route makes the contract visible: ask for a hint, check a step, improve a draft, critique a source, then prove the learning with review.
entries.value: Déanann bealach na hoibre baile an conradh infheicthe: iarr leid, seiceáil céim, feabhsaigh dréacht, déan léirmheas ar fhoinse, ansin cruthaigh an fhoghlaim le hathbhreithniú.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: Is é an srian tábhachtach ná sriantacht. Níor chóir do theagascóir IS Sócraiteach an freagra a dhumpáil ag an gcéad chomhartha deacrachta. Ba chóir dó an iarracht a dhéanamh níos éasca le coinneáil.

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Is é an beart tábhachtach tosú le fíorphost foghlama, ní le pras foirfe. Is féidir le compánach maith an chonair a mhúnlú nuair a thosaíonn tú.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Ní freagairt amháin atá sa phost

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Fanann an turas fréamhaithe i staid agus i bhfianaise: an méid atá ar eolas, an méid atá athchruthaithe, an méid atá tuairimeach, agus cad is féidir le d'fhéiniúlacht a rochtain go réalaíoch.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Ní hé an pointe dhá uirlis dhifriúla a leacú ina bhuaiteoir amháin. Is é an pointe an post foghlama a mheaitseáil leis an iompar a chabhraíonn is tapúla.

entries.source: The point is not to use AI less. It is to use it in a way that leaves you with stronger understanding after the session.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.

Is í an cheist níos fearr an bhfuil an uirlis ag cabhrú leat cuimhne, breithiúnas, agus muinín a thógáil, nó an bhfuil sí ag baint go ciúin an streachailt chruinn a fhágann go bhfanann foghlaim.

entries.value: An ceart rochtain a fháil ar an bhfaisnéis atá againn fút, í a nuashonrú nó a scriosadh; an ceart ceartúcháin. Tá sé de cheart agat do chuid faisnéise a cheartú má tá sí míchruinn nó neamhiomlán; an ceart agóid a dhéanamh. Tá sé de cheart agat agóid a dhéanamh i gcoinne ár bpróiseáil ar do Shonraí Pearsanta; an ceart srianta. Tá sé de cheart agat iarraidh orainn próiseáil do chuid faisnéise pearsanta a shrianadh; an ceart inaistritheachta sonraí. Tá sé de cheart agat cóip de do Shonraí Pearsanta a fháil i bhformáid struchtúrtha, inléite ag meaisín agus a úsáidtear go coitianta; an ceart toiliú a tharraingt siar. Tá sé de cheart agat freisin do thoiliú a tharraingt siar ag aon am nuair a bhraithimid ar do thoiliú chun do chuid faisnéise pearsanta a phróiseáil; Tabhair faoi deara go bhféadfaimid iarraidh ort d’aitheantas a fhíorú sula bhfreagraímid d’iarratais den sórt sin. Tabhair faoi deara, b’fhéidir nach mbeimid in ann an tSeirbhís a sholáthar gan roinnt sonraí riachtanacha. Tá sé de cheart agat gearán a dhéanamh le hÚdarás Cosanta Sonraí faoi bhailiú agus úsáid do Shonraí Pearsanta againn. Le haghaidh tuilleadh faisnéise, déan teagmháil le d’údarás cosanta sonraí áitiúil sa Limistéar Eorpach Eacnamaíoch (LEE).

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.

Uaireanta teastaíonn tráth ceiste, spléachchártaí, cleachtadh díospóireachta, cóitseálaí scríbhneoireachta, nó rólghlacadh stairiúil.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Tá sé seo tábhachtach do scoileanna agus teaghlaigh mar ní tallann an chéad bhac go minic. Is é costas cabhrach, eagla ceist "bhunúsach" a chur, nó easpa duine foighneach ag an nóiméad cruinn a thagann mearbhall. Laghdaíonn compánach poiblí saor in aisce costas an tosaithe.
